def: s.m. = S پرمتتا परिमितता pari-mitatā, s.f. Limitedness, moderation, limited or restricted condition.
s.f. Measure, quantity, limitation.
part. Faded, withered; waned; diminished, impaired; soiled, stained.
s.m. The act of bewildering; beguiling; fascination, infatuation.
adj. (f. -inī), Fascinating, infatuating, bewitching.
adj. Past, elapsed; ancient: — pārīna daftar s.m. Ancient record.
s.m. Compass, circumference, extent, width, breadth.

s.m. Change, alteration, transformation; digestion; ripeness, maturity, fulness; result, consequence, issue, effect, event; end, close, termination, last stage or state: pariṇām, or pariṇām-meṅ, adv. In the end, lastly, finally, at last, afterwards; at the close of life
more: n. m. S. प्रणाली A gutter; drain; conduit. Panchoṅ kā kahnā sir āṅkhoṅ par, magar parnālā yaṅhīṅ rahegā . Prov. I bow before the judgment of the Panch (corporation), but the drain shall remain where it is. (Said of stubbornness).
subs: adj. & s.m. Looking forward to the issue or consequences (of any act or event), prepared for a change, forecasting, provident, prudent; — a prudent or provident person, &c.

def: s.m. 'Leading the bride round the sacred fire,' marriage.
wety: Inherited from Sauraseni Prakrit 𑀧𑀭𑀺𑀡𑀻𑀤 (pariṇīda), from Sanskrit परिणीत (pariṇīta, “married”, adjective).

def: adj. & s.m. Relating or pertaining to marriage; obtained on the occasion of marriage; — property received by a woman at the time of her marriage.
s.m. = pari-ṇay, q.v. s.m. 'Leading the bride round the sacred fire,' marriage.
s.m. Lion; a large snake (boa).
s.m. = pari-vār, q.v. s.m. Surroundings, train, suite, retinue, followers, attendants, dependants, subjects; family, household, friends, relations, kindred
subs: parivār-vant, adj. & s.m. Having numerous followers or attendants; — one who has a great retinue.

def: adj. = pari-pakva, q.v. adj. Completely cooked or dressed; completely burnt (as a brick); digested; quite ripe, mature; highly cultivated or educated, very knowing or shrewd; near death or decay, decaying.
s.m. Being completely cooked or dressed; digestion; ripening, maturity, perfection; cleverness, shrewdness, experience.
s.m. Being completely cooked or dressed; digestion; ripening, maturity, perfection; cleverness, shrewdness, experience.
s.f. The plant Ipomæa turpethum (used as a drug).
adj. Completely cooked or dressed; completely burnt (as a brick); digested; quite ripe, mature; highly cultivated or educated, very knowing or shrewd; near death or decay, decaying.
s.f. = S پرپکوتو परिपक्वत्व pari-pakvatva, s.m. The state of being completely cooked; digestion; ripeness, full maturity, perfection; shrewdness, knowingness; fluency.
s.m. = S پرپکوتا परिपक्वता pari-pakvatā, s.f. The state of being completely cooked; digestion; ripeness, full maturity, perfection; shrewdness, knowingness; fluency.
adj. & s.m. Guarding, protecting, defending, maintaining, supporting, sustaining; — protector, guardian, nourisher, cherisher, maintainer, &c.
s.m. Protecting, cherishing, defending, maintaining, sustaining, keeping; protection, nurture
part. Protected, cherished.
s.m. Antagonist, opponent, enemy, adversary; robber, highwayman, bandit.
s.m. Highwayman, robber, thief.
s.m. Antagonist, opponent, enemy, adversary; robber, highwayman, bandit.
s.f. Succession, order, method, arrangement; arithmetic.
s.m. Name of one of the seven principal mountain-ranges of India (the central or western portion of the Vindhya chain which skirts the province of Malwa).
s.m. A fragrant grass, Cyperus rotundus.
adj. & s.m. Swimming about; undulating, waving, shaking, tremulous, unsteady; — inundation; bathing, wetting, immersing; — a ship, boat.
part. Flooded, inundated; wetted, bathed, immersed.
s.m. Honouring highly, worshipping, adoring.
part. Much honoured, served, worshipped, adored.
part. Filled; satisfied, completed, fulfilled; brimful.
adj. Quite full, very full, brimful, completely filled, entire, complete, replete; fully satisfied, content, self-satisfied.
more: from परि or प्र and r. पूर Fill) adj. Brimful.

def: s.f. = S پرپورنتو परिपूणत्व pari-pūrṇatva, s.m. Completion, completeness, entireness, fulness; satisfaction, satiety.
s.m. = S پرپورنتا परिपूर्णता pari-pūrṇatā, s.f. Completion, completeness, entireness, fulness; satisfaction, satiety.
s.f. A species of cucumber, Cucumis maderaspattanus.
s.m. Accomplishing, effecting, bringing to a conclusion; arranging, settling; determining, ascertaining.
s.m. The act of finishing completely; entire completion ( = pari-samāpti).
part. Fully completed, completely finished, entirely done.
s.f. Entire completion, end, conclusion.
part. adj. To be doubted or distrusted; to be feared or apprehended.
s.f. An exhaustive enumeration; recapitulation; reckoning.
part. adj. Counted, reckoned up; enumerated, specified exclusively.
s.m. Cursing, reviling, anathema.
s.m. Standing-place, position, site; verge, border, proximity, neighbourhood, environs, ground on the border of a river or mountain, or contiguous to a town, &c.; width, breadth, extent, dimension.
s.m. Remnant, remains, remainder, residue, rest; conclusion, completion, termination.
adj. & s.m. Pertaining to an assembly; — king's companion; retinue of a god; an attendant; person present at an assembly, spectator.
s.f. Assembly, meeting, audience, congregation, council.
s.m. Adorning, ornament, decoration, embellishment; finishing; polishing, cleaning, purification (by essential rites); initiation; the repairing a building.
part. Prepared, equipped; highly finished, polished; adorned, decorated, embellished; cleansed, scoured, purified (by initiatory rites)
subs: s.f. An altar or ground prepared for a sacrifice.

def: s.f. = S پرسيمن परिसीमन् pari-sīman, s.m. Boundary, border, extreme term or limit.
s.m. = S پرسيما परिसीमा pari-sīmā, s.f. Boundary, border, extreme term or limit.
part. adj. & s.m. Left, remaining; finished; — a supplement, appendix.
s.m. Cleansing, purifying; correcting; purification; justification; retaliation; paying, discharging a debt, quittance.
s.m. Cleansing, purifying; correcting; purification; justification; retaliation; paying, discharging a debt, quittance.
s.m. Becoming completely dried up, dryness, desiccation, evaporation.
s.m. = pari-śram, q.v.
s.m. Fatigue, distress; fatiguing occupation, labour, exertion, effort, endeavour, toil, pains, trouble; industry
more: n. m. S. अम to labor. See. اُدم 1, 2. Binā parishram gun nahīṅ, gun bin nahīṅ bishrām; Dukhi hot haiṅ ālasī, sabhā bikhe apmān . Dohā No merit pains without, of merit void no rest, Unhappy all the idle are, at feasts no honored guest.

def: adj. Active, industrious, energetic, laborious, painstaking.
adj. Active, laborious.
part. Thoroughly fatigued, worn out, exhausted, wearied.
s.f. Fatigue, exhaustion; labour, toil, trouble, distress.
s.m. = parī-stān, q.v.s.v. parī.
more: n. m. P. parī fairy, stān , S. स्थान place. Fairyland.
(پري Fairy, and ستان Place) s. m. Fairy-land.
wety: Borrowed from Classical Persian پَرِیسْتَان (parīstān), from پَرِی (parī) + ـسْتَان (-stān). By surface analysis, پَری (parī) + ـسْتان (-stān).

def: part. Completely cleansed, cleaned, purified; acquitted, discharged; cleared off, paid.
adv. = pari-tas, q.v. adv. Around, round about, all around, on all sides, on every side, everywhere, in every direction, from all parts.
s.m. Glow, heat, scorching heat; pain, anguish, grief, sorrow, affliction; name of a particular hell.
adj. Burning hot, very hot; causing much pain or sorrow, causing anguish, torturing, tormenting.
adv. Around, round about, all around, on all sides, on every side, everywhere, in every direction, from all parts.
s.f. String of pearls for binding the hair; a trinket worn on the forehead where the hair is parted.
s.m. Complete satisfaction, gratification, contentment, contentedness, satiety, pleasure, delight, glee; — paritosh-vān, paritosh-vat, paritosh-vant, adj. Satisfied, contented, glad.
adj. Satisfying, gratifying, pleasure-giving.
s.m. Satisfying, gratifying; who or what satisfies or makes content; — satisfaction, &c. = paritosh, q.v.
s.m. Who or what gratifies, one who satisfies completely, satisfier; who or what pleases or makes very glad.
s.m. Who or what gratifies, one who satisfies completely, satisfier; who or what pleases or makes very glad.
adj. & s.m. Completely satisfied, contented; — a contented person.
adj. & s.m. Gratifying, delighting, making happy, satisfactory, consolatory; — reward, gratuity (given as a token of satisfaction).
more: s. m. A gratification, a complimentary present.

def: v.t. To satisfy, to afford satisfaction or pleasure.
s.m. Protecting, protection, preserving, rescuing, rescue, deliverance, preservation, defence, salvation.
s.m. Protector, defender, rescuer, saviour.
s.m. Protector, defender, rescuer, saviour.
part. Completely satisfied, contented, much pleased, delighted.
s.m. Abandonment, desertion, repudiation, divorce, rejection; renunciation, sacrifice, abdication; neglect, omission; loss, privation
s.m. Abandoning, deserting, &c. ( = pari-tyāg, q.v.). s.m. Abandonment, desertion, repudiation, divorce, rejection; renunciation, sacrifice, abdication; neglect, omission; loss, privation
adj. Abandoning, quitting, forsaking, deserting, repudiating, relinquishing, resigning, renouncing.
part. Left, quitted, deserted, abandoned; bereft (of), deprived (of), void (of).
s.f. The first day of a lunar fortnight, the first day of the moon's increase or wane.
more: s. f. The first day of a lunar fortnight, the first of the moonʼs increase or wane.

def: s.f. The first day of the moon.
s.f. = pariwā, q.v. s.f. The first day of a lunar fortnight, the first day of the moon's increase or wane.
more: s. (dakh.) A boat, barge, ferryboat ( Harris ).

def: s.m. Abuse, reproach, reproof, censure, detraction, stigma, slander, calumny; charge, accusation.
s.m. = pari-vād, q.v. s.m. Abuse, reproach, reproof, censure, detraction, stigma, slander, calumny; charge, accusation.
adj. & s.m. Speaking ill (of), reviling, abusing, blaming, reproaching, slandering; — an accuser, plaintiff, prosecutor; reprover; reviler, calumniator.
adj. & s.m. Speaking ill (of), reviling, abusing, blaming, reproaching, slandering; — an accuser, plaintiff, prosecutor; reprover; reviler, calumniator.
s.m. Overflowing, overflow, inundation; watercourse, drain.
more: n. m. S. वह to carry. 1. The overflowing of a tank; overflow, natural or artificial; inundation. 2. Stream; current of a river. 3. A water course or drain to carry off excess of water. Dhān ke khet meṅ parah le āo . 4. Throwing into the water. parivāh karnā , v. a. To throw, or cast into the river.

def: s.m. Surroundings, train, suite, retinue, followers, attendants, dependants, subjects; family, household, friends, relations, kindred
more: n. m. S. परिवार Family; household; relations ( kuṭumb ); kindred; connections.
subs: parivār-vant, adj. & s.m. Having numerous followers or attendants; — one who has a great retinue.

def: s.f. = S پروارتو परिवारत्व pari-vāratva, s.m. Subjection, dependence.
s.m. = S پروارتا परिवारता parivāratā, s.f. Subjection, dependence.

s.m. Revolving, revolution (of a planet, &c.); a period of time; lapse or expiration of time, end of the period of four ages; destruction of the world; going or turning back, flight, retreat, desertion; transmigration; change, exchange, barter; return, requital, recompense, reciprocity.
s.m. Change, exchange, barter; return, requital.
adj. Moving round, revolving; retreating, flying; exchanging; requiting, recompensing.
part. Turned round, revolved; returned, retreated; taken, or put on, in a wrong direction; exchanged.
s.m. = pariwār, q.v. s.m. Surroundings, train, suite, retinue, followers, attendants, dependants, subjects; family, household, friends, relations, kindred
subs: parivār-vant, adj. & s.m. Having numerous followers or attendants; — one who has a great retinue.

def: s.m. Abiding; abode, residence, stay, sojourn.
s.m. Complete or accurate knowledge; discussion; anguish, pain, misery; the marrying of a younger brother before the elder; marriage.
s.f. Shrewdness, wit; prudence, foresight, caution; anguish, &c. ( = parivedan).
s.m. Surrounding, enclosing; circumference; halo (round the sun or moon); — attendance, waiting (upon), distributing food, serving up meals.
s.m. One who serves up meals, waiter, carver.
s.m. = pari-veshaṇ, q.v. s.m. Surrounding, enclosing; circumference; halo (round the sun or moon); — attendance, waiting (upon), distributing food, serving up meals.
part. Surrounded, enclosed, encompassed; covered, veiled.
s.m. = pari-veshṭā, q.v. s.m. One who serves up meals, waiter, carver.
part. Surrounded, enclosed.
s.m. A wandering religious mendicant.
s.f. Strolling, wandering about from place to place; leading the life of a religious mendicant, ascetic devotion, abandonment of the world.
part. Revolved, gone round; turned back, returned, retired, retreated; exchanged, bartered; surrounded, encompassed, attended.
s.m. A species of reed, Calamus fasciculatus; a species of tree, Pterospermum acerifolium.
s.f. A young buffalo (female; — cf. paṛūʼā).
more: s. f. A female buffalo calf.

def: adj. Fairy-like, &c. = parī-zād, q.v.
more: adj. Fairy-like; beautiful; good-looking; fair; lovely.

E. n. f. 1. A young female buffalo (W. kaṭyā ). 2. (W. paṛokyā) . A low Brahman who takes from Hindus alms, such as oil, old black blankets, etc. all black things, on every Saturday which is accounted a black day.

n. f. Dim. of puṛā . 1. Any thing wrapped up in paper or leaves. 2. An offering to a God or Deity. 3. ( Med ). a powder. 4. Majenta, etc. in papers. puṛyāṅ uṛānā , v. n. To make offerings of abīr and seṅdūr to a saint. Shartī uṛāūṅ puṛyāṅ, aur dūṅ khaṛā maiṅ daunā, Gar ab-ke mujh se mil jāë, aë pīr, merī bājī . Mah. Wom. Rangīṅ. I vow I'll instant offerings lay my saint before, If but my eldest sister I embrace once more!

def: s.m. = pāri-pātra, q.v. s.m. Name of one of the seven principal mountain-ranges of India (the central or western portion of the Vindhya chain which skirts the province of Malwa).
adj. Fairy-born; a fairy, a beauty.
n. m. S. प्रजा धर्म्म. The duties of subjects; loyalty.
s.f. Order, method; custom, manner; place, room.
s. f. 1. Order, method, custom, manner. 2. Place, room.
v. n. To lie down; to repose, to cease (as the wind), to abate.
s.f. The plant Cucumis aromatica, or C. xanthorrhiza.
s.m. A bedstead ( = palang).

s.m. = paryant, q.v. (pari+anta), s.m. & postp. Boundary, limit, edge, skirt, border, extremity; end, termination; — up to, as far as, to the extent of; unto, until. (It is annexed to an accusatival base or to an adverb.)
s.m. A rain-cloud, thunder-cloud; rain; the god of rain.

n. m. S. प्रजापति. 1. An epithet of Brahma; Creator. 2. A king; a prince; a lord; a governor. 3. ( parjāpat .) A title of potters ( kumhār ). Parjā pat, is khilaune kā kyā loge? Potter, what will you take for this toy?
s.m. Wandering about, roaming, travelling.
s.m. Wandering about, roaming, travelling.
s.f. See s.v. para, par. s.m. Quicksilver, mercury; — adj. Heavy, weighty
subs: pārā pilānā (meṅ, -ko), To fill or load with quicksilver; to make heavy

def: s.m. Ground rent levied on houses; quit-rent, tax.
s.m. An adulterer.
s.m. Ground rent levied on houses; quit-rent, tax.
more: n. m. Ground rent levied on houses.

def: s.m. = parjank, paryank, q.v. s.m. A bedstead ( = palang).

s.m. = paryant, q.v. (pari+anta), s.m. & postp. Boundary, limit, edge, skirt, border, extremity; end, termination; — up to, as far as, to the extent of; unto, until. (It is annexed to an accusatival base or to an adverb.)
s.m. = parjaṭan, paryaṭan, q.v. s.m. Wandering about, roaming, travelling.
s.m. = paryavasān, q.v. s.m. End, termination, conclusion, issue.
s.m. = par-jāʼe, paryāy, q.v. s.f. Order, method; custom, manner; place, room.
s.m. See s.v. para, par. s.m. Quicksilver, mercury; — adj. Heavy, weighty
more: n. m. S. पर other, कार्य्य business. The business or interest of another.
s. m. The business or interest of another.
subs: pārā pilānā (meṅ, -ko), To fill or load with quicksilver; to make heavy

def: adj. Attentive to the business or interest of others; serving others.
more: adj. Attentive to the business or interest of others, serving others, beneficent.

def: s.m. = P. parkār, q.v.
s.m. A stair, ladder, steps (syn. zīna).
more: n. m. S. उपरिक्रमालय A stair ( zīnah ).

def: s.m. A spark; a pane of glass.
more: n. m. 1. A spark. 2. A pane of glass. Din bhar parkāle ghistā hai .
s. m. 1. A spark. 2. A pane of glass.

def: adj. Become useless; reduced to nothing; out of employ, idle.
s. (dakh.) Adversity, lack ( Harris ).

s.f. = pari-kramā, q.v. s.f. Walking round or about; circuit, circumambulation; the going round a person or an idol to the right as an indication of reverence ( = pradakshiṇ); (in Astron.) revolving, revolution; a covered way round a temple
more: n. f. S. परिक्रमा 1. Circuit; circumambulation. 2. Reverentially going round a temple or an object, keeping the same always on one's right. (A religious observance). 3. A covered way round a temple. parkammā denā, yā karnā , v. n. To walk reverentially round a temple or shrine.
subs: pari-kramā karnā, pari-kramā lenā (-kī), To walk round a person, or an idol, by way of adoration, &c. ( = pradakshiṇ karnā); to go round, make a circuit.

def: s.m. A trunnion.
v.t. To habituate, accustom, familiarize.
more: v. a. E. See پرچانا To familiarize. 1. Larikā ne parkāve ke chāhīṅ . Mag. Children should not be shewn too much affection. 2. Harkāval bhaī, prikāval nahīṅ bhal . Tir. To drive away is well, to make much of is not well.
v. a. To accustom, to habituate.

def: s.m. A pair of compasses ( = pargār).
more: n. m. A pair of compasses.
s. (dakh.) A pair of compasses ( Harris ): see پرگار pargār.

def: adj. Made or done with compasses.
s.m. A heron.
s.f. The waved-leaved fig-tree, Ficus infectoria (com. called pākaṛ).
s.f. Examining, testing, assaying; the price paid for assaying, &c.
more: n. f. Testing coin; the fee for testing coin.

def: s. f. 1. The act of examining. 2. The price paid for examination, inspection, trial or proof.
v.t. To cause to be inspected; to cause to inspect; to have or get (a thing) tested, tried, or proved; to examine, test, try, prove ( = parakhnā).
more: v. a. Caus. of پرکهنا To give ( denā ); present; pay. Mujhe kyā tum ne hunḍī parkhā di hai? Have you given me a cheque? (Said to one who gives large commissions, but no money).
(causal of پرکهنا q. v.) v. a. To cause to inspect, examine, try or prove.

def: s.m. War, battle, conflict, altercation, quarrel, misunderstanding; commotion, disturbance, tumult; violence, injury, oppression; severe inquisition.
more: s. m. War, battle, conflict, altercation, commotion, disturbance, tumult, violence, injury, oppression, severe inquisition.

def: s.f. = parkhāʼī, q.v. s.f. Examining, testing, assaying; the price paid for assaying, &c.
s.m. = par-khaiyā, q.v.
s.m. One who examines and approves money, money-tester, assayer, banker; tester, inspector, examiner, prover.
more: (plur. of پرکها from पुरुष ) s. m. Ancestors, ancestry. See پرشا purush̤ā.

def: s.m. Examiner, tester, discriminator, judge, critic, connoiseur.
more: see پرکهـ parakh ) s. m. An examiner, a discriminator.

def: s. m. (dakh.) See پارکهي pārkhī.
s.m. A barrier, a wall round a town.
adj. (f. -ī), Of the other side or end; next in order; yonder
more: adj. S. पर distance. Of the other side; next in order; yonder. parle pār , adv. On the other side; far off; far away; far beyond; a long way off; through. parle sire kā, parle darje kā , adj. Great; extreme; excessive; consummate; arch; thorough-paced. parle sire kā, parle darje kā , adv. In a complete degree; in the extreme; out and out; every inch; utter; quite. Woh to parle sire kā be-īmān hai .
subs: adj. On the other side; far beyond; far away, far off, a long way off; through
adj. & adv. Great, thorough, extreme, excessive, of the first or highest degree; — in a complete degree, in the extreme, thoroughly, utterly, out and out.

def: n. f. S. प्रलय from प्र, ली to dissolve. A general destruction, as the great flood; doomsday. 1. Kāl karante āj kar, āj karante ab; Pal meṅ pralaë ho gaī, to pher karegā kab? Dohā. What is to do to-morrow do to-day, to-day's work now, When in a moment doomsday comes no time for work, I trow. 2. Āp mare, jag parlo . Prov. When I am dead the world to me is dead!
s.m. See s.v. para, par. s.m. Quicksilver, mercury; — adj. Heavy, weighty
more: n. m. The next world; the world to come. par-lok sudhārnā , v. n. See ākhrat saṅwārnā .
subs: pārā pilānā (meṅ, -ko), To fill or load with quicksilver; to make heavy

def: s.m. = pramāṇ, q.v. s.m. Measure, scale, standard (whether of weight, length, or capacity); magnitude, extent, length, weight, quantity, proportion, detail; rule, sanction, ground of assurance, standard, authority, judgment, proof, verification, attestation, warrant, precedent, guide, rule of conduct; instance, example; testimony, evidence; trust, belief, reliance; a scripture, a work of sacred authority; cause, motive; — adj. Authentic, authoritative, actual, substantial, real; approved of, admissible, credible, acceptable; — postp. Like, of the measure or standard (of, -ke), &c.
subs: (˚na+abh˚), s.m. Absence of proof, want of authority
s.m. A written warrant; affidavit; voucher
s.m. 'A man who is an authority,' an umpire, arbitrator, judge
v.n. To rise to a high rank
v.n. To give evidence, to witness
s.f. Proof (or attempted proof) by appeal to records or to books (as distinguished from hearsay or tradition)
(-ko, or -kā), To assent (to), accept, credit, believe; to give evidence, to witness.

def: adj. Excessively happy; overjoyed. parm-ānand' , n. m. The greatest or highest delight; supreme felicity. 2. Final happiness; heaven; beatitude.

n. m. The essential meaning; the first aim or object; the chief end; final object; the highest virtue or merit; salvation ( muktī ). Kuchh suārthe, kuchh parmārthe . Prov. Somewhat for self and somewhat for Heaven. parmārath sudhārnā , v. n. To do good deeds that may procure salvation. parmārath ke het lagānā , v. n. To give alms with a view to salvation.
n. m. A religious or virtuous person.
s.m. See s.v. para, par. s.m. Quicksilver, mercury; — adj. Heavy, weighty
more: n. f. Credit ( sākh ); reputation; name.
n. f. Cor. of Permit. Customs; custom house.
subs: pārā pilānā (meṅ, -ko), To fill or load with quicksilver; to make heavy

def: s.f. A custom-house, customs
Port of entry.
n. m. One dependent on others' advice.
s.m. Urinary disease; gonorrhœa, clap, gleet.
more: n. m. S. परिमल Parched Indian corn.
s. m. A gonorrhœa, a (venereal) clap, a gleet.

def: n. m. The Supreme God; the Almighty.
s.f. A kind of dance.

ety: pār˚ = Prk. पारे(इ), or पार(इ) = S. पारय(ति), caus. of rt. पृ
def: v.t. To finish, accomplish, &c. (see pāraṇ and pāraṇ karnā).
more: v. a. S. उत्पद् to produce. 1. To produce; generate; make; create. Kājal pārnā . 2. To complete; finish; accomplish.
s. m. Breaking a fast. v. a. To finish, to accomplish.

def: v.t. = pāṛnā, q.v. v.t. To finish, accomplish, &c. (see pāraṇ and pāraṇ karnā).

ety: pāṛ˚ = Prk. पाडे(इ), or पाड(इ) = S. पातय(ति), caus. of rt. पत्
def: v.t. To let fall, cause to fall, to knock or throw down; to kill.
more: v. a. 1. To let fall, cause to fall, to knock or throw down; to finish, to kill. 2. To collect lamp-black. پاڙپڙنا pāṛ-paṛnā (dakh.) To suffer a blow (صدمه کهينچنا).

def: v.t. To finish, &c. = pārnā, q.v.; — to make or collect (lamp-black, kājal, by holding or passing a plate or metal dish over a lamp).

ety: Prk. पडणअं; S. पतनीयं, rt. पत्
def: v.n. To fall, drop; to fall down, drop down; to lie, lie down, recline, repose; to lie idle, useless, or unoccupied; to be set or laid aside; to be laid up, be prostrated, be bed-ridden; to fall to the lot (of, -ko); to be tied (to, — as a wife, servant, &c.); to live or stay (with, or in the house of, -meṅ); to hang or depend (upon, -par, or -pe), to sponge (on); to be encamped, to halt, encamp, camp; to be or become; to happen, arise, take place, occur; to happen to be or become, prove to be; to befal, overtake (as punishment); to be keen (after), to hanker (after); to interfere, intermeddle (in, -meṅ); to be concerned (about), have to do (with); to stand, cost, come to, be valued (at); to be suitable (to, -ko), to suit, agree (with); to be digested. (Following the uninflected infinitive of another verb, paṛnā, like honā, signifies 'have to,' 'must'; e.g. usko jāne paṛā, 'he had to go'; — annexed to the base of some neuter verbs it forms intensives, as gir-paṛnā, 'to fall down'; — annexed to the base of a transitive verb it has generally the sense of honā, as dekh paṛnā, 'to be seen,' 'to become visible')
more: v. n. 1. To fall. 2. To lie down, repose. 3. To befall, happen, occur. 4. To encamp. 5. To drop. 6. To be confined to bed by sickness. پڙرهنا paṛ rahnā or پڙي رهنا paṛe rahnā, To remain helpless, poor or destitute.
v. a. (dakh.) To read, to repeat: see پڙهنا paṛhnā.
subs: v.n. To lie down, to repose; to be laid across, be spread (over); to lull, cease (as the wind), to abate; to become set, hoarse, or husky (as the voice); to be or become; to happen to be
v.n. To remain lying; to be idle; to be prostrated (through sickness or grief); to be helpless, poor, or destitute ( = paṛe rahnā, q.v.s.v. paṛā).

def: v. n. See ānā (3—13, 24, 27.). 1. To fall; drop; drop; down; fall upon. 1. Peṭ meṅ paṛī roṭiyāṅ, to sab gallāṅ moṭyāṅ . Prov. When the stomach's full the wit is bright. 2. Merī māī baṛī kameran pisā kūṭī kartī hai, Bālak, bachche roṭī māṅgeṅ, le le mūsal partī hai . Bread-winner rare's my mother! grinding, pounding is her trade, If but her children ask for bread the pestle's on them laid. 2. To halt; pitch one's tent; camp; encamp; anchor. 3. To stay with or become one's mistress. Ghar meṅ paṛnā . 4. To lie; lie down; recline; repose. 1. Yār kā dil yār rakkhe, to yār kā bhī rakhye, Yār ke ghar khīr pakke, to āp bhī chakhye, Yār ke ghar āg lage, to paṛā paṛā takye . Prov. Your friend's heart your's, do you just keep your own, When milk and rice he has do you make one, His house on fire—lay quiet and look on. 2. Kāṅdhe pe rakhte pālkī haiṅ ādmī kahār, Aur us meṅ jo paṛā hai, so hai woh bhī ādmī . Nazīr. And they who on their shoulders palkīs bear are men, And those reclining in them likewise are but men. 5. To lie idle or useless; to be pigeon-holed, unadjudicated. 1. Paṛe paṛe taṅg ā gaë . 2. Baras din se muqadmā paṛā hai . 6. To be down on one's back; to be laid up, bed ridden. Do mahīne se paṛā huā hai . 7. To be laid across; to be spread over. Chhat pe kaṛyāṅ paṛ gaīṅ . 8. To hang or depend on; to sponge. Susrāl kī roṭiyoṅ pe paṛā hai . 9. To be bent or keen upon; to hanker after. Jawānoṅ ko chalā-chalī, buḍḍhoṅ ko biyāh kī paṛī . Prov. Young men and maidens pass away, the old ones see at wedlock play. 10. To interpose; interfere; meddle with. Tumhāre muāmle meṅ kaun paṛe? 11. To have to do with; to be concerned about. Bāṭe baṭohī, tujhe merī kyā re paṛī? Song. 12. To be vacant, unoccupied. Do ghar paṛe huë haiṅ . 13. To be; become; grow to; change to. Ab to bāloṅ meṅ dūdh paṛ gayā hai . 14. To be designated, called; to be in men's mouths; to become the town talk. 1. Afwāh paṛnā . 2. Yehī nām paṛ gayā . 15. E. To sink; go down; lull; abate; subside. Hawā paṛ gaī . 16. To become hoarse or husky. Galā paṛ gayā . 17. To fall to one's lot; to be tied to one (a wife, servant, etc.). 18. To cost; to be valued at; to come to. 'Kitne kitne paṛīṅ?' 'Pāoṅ paṛī kā mol kyā?' 'What did you pay for these (shoes)?' (How many shoe-beatings have you had). Retort . Shoes once worn are not saleable. (Who fall at your feet are worthless). 19. To conceive. Peṭ meṅ paṛnā . 20. To cover (a stallion); to pair. 21. To suit; agree or accord with. Ḍāktar kī davā nahīṅ paṛtī . 22. To be digested. Bachche ko dūdh nahīṅ paṛtā. paṛā khet , n. m. ( Math .) A surface; a horizontal plane. paṛī , adj. ( Bot .) Prostrate. paṛā chakkar , n. m. Latitude. paṛe rahnā , v. n. 1. To lay or be laid on one's back; to lie prostrate or helpless. 2. To loll or sleep all day; to be idle. paṛī lakīr , n. f. ( Math .) A horizontal line. āge paṛ jānā , v. n. To yield; give way, or consent readily (frail woman). paṛallo kī lenā, yā ṭhairā'nā , v. n. To lie down; loll. paṛā, paṛī , adv. In its own place; as it is. Kabūtar paṛe uṛte haiṅ .
s.m. Wing, feather; leaf; the pān or betel-leaf; the tree Butea frondosa (syn. pulās)
subs: (˚ṇa+asi˚), s.m. A species of basil with small leaves, Ocymum Sanctum
s.f. 'Leaf-hut,' an arbour or hut made of leaves and grass; hermitage
s.m. The plant Averrhoa carambola (syn. kamrangā)
s.m. 'Man of leaves,' an effigy stuffed with leaves, or the figure of a man made of leaves and burnt in place of a lost corpse
(˚ṇa+uṭ˚), s.m. 'Leaf-hut,' an anchorite's hut or cottage, a hermitage

def: s. m. A gutter, a drain, a conduit.
s.m. = S پرنال प्रणाल pra-ṇāl, s.m. = S پرنالي प्रणाली pra-ṇālī, s.f. Channel for water, watercourse, conduit, drain, gutter.
more: n. m. S. पण Promise; agreement; vow.

wety: Inherited from Sauraseni Prakrit 𑀧𑀭𑀺𑀡𑀻𑀤 (pariṇīda), from Sanskrit परिणीत (pariṇīta, “married”, adjective).

more: s. m. A kind of fine painted silk.

def: s.m. See s.v. parṇa. v.t. To finish, accomplish, &c. (see pāraṇ and pāraṇ karnā).

= S پروپديش परोपदेश paropadeś, See s.v. para, par.

more: E. n. m. S. प्रतिवास, , Pr. pṛibās . Neighbourhood; vicinity.

more: n. m. S. परि + विष to offer food. A dish of food laid before a guest, or sent to a friend; a share or portion of food. Samdhī mat nā jhagṛe mo se, Lo sāt hajār parose, maiṅ hāth joṛ kahūṅ to se! Play. Chaubolā. Fight not, co-father-in-law, with me, I humbly pray, Seven thousand trays of sweets I'll give—your tongue but stay!
s.m. A dish of food which is sent to a friend.

wety: Inherited from Sauraseni Prakrit 𑀧𑀟𑀺𑀯𑁂𑀲𑀺𑀅 (paḍivesia), from Sanskrit प्रतिवेश्य (prativeśya). By surface analysis, پَڑوس (paṛos, “neighbourhood”) + ی (ī).

def: s.f. A female neighbour (see parosī).
more: n. f. A female neighbour. Ā, paṛoson, mujh sī ho! Wom. Prov. Come, neighbour, be like me! (Said when bad men strive to corrupt the innocent and good).

def: s.f. A female neighbour (see paṛosī).
s.m. One who places food before the household or guests, a distributor of victuals to guests &c., a waiter (see parosnā).
more: n. m. One who serves the victuals.
s. m. A distributer of victuals to the guests, one who serves up dinner, a waiter.

def: v.t. To place food before a guest; to distribute food to guests, to serve up dinner, &c.
more: v. a. To serve a meal to the household, or guests. 1. Sone ke thalyā meṅ jeonā re parosoṅ; Khaë lehū re nandoiyā pahunwā . Mag. 2. Mātā ke parse, bhādoṅ ke barse, peṭ bhartā hai . Prov. The meal the mother serves like August rains the stomach fills.
v. a. To serve up dinner, to distribute food to guests, &c.

def: s. m. A duplicate of a bill of exchange.
s.m. Tingling sensation, smart; throbbing.

def: v.n. To tingle, to smart, to throb with pain (as the tongue from an acid substance; also written paṛpaṛānā).
more: v. n. 1. To prattle. 2. To smart.

s.m. The child of a son's son, a great-grandson.
adj. = pari-pūrṇ, q.v.

more: n. A line of foot or horse. Turaq ke turaq aur pare ke pare, Kuchh īdhar udhar, kuchh ware, kuchh pare . Mīr Hasan.
s. m. A town. See پر pur and پرا purā.

def: s.m. Persia.
s.m.f. Abstemious, temperate, continent, chaste, pure, virtuous, holy; — chaste or pure man or woman; holy man, devotee, anchorite.
more: adj. Continent; chaste; pure; holy. pārsā , n. m. One who abstains from immoral practices; an anchorite; a holy man; a devotee.
adj. Abstemious, chaste, watchful. (Pers. plur. پارسايان).

def: s.f. Abstinence, temperateness, continence, chastity, purity, virtue, holiness.
n. f. Abstinence; continence; chastity; purity; holiness.

s. or adv. Last year.

wety: Inherited from Prakrit 𑀧𑀸𑀭𑀲 (pārasa), from Sanskrit पारसि (pārasi), पारसिक (pārasika), from Middle Persian 𐭯𐭠𐭫𐭮𐭩' (pʾlsy /Pārs/), from Old Persian 𐎱𐎠𐎼𐎿 (Pārsa). Also influenced by Classical Persian پَارْسِی (pārsī). Cognate with Bengali পারসি (parśi), Gujarati પારસી (pārsī), Marathi पारशी (pārśī), Punjabi ਪਾਰਸੀ (pārsī) / پَارْسِی (pārsī). Doublet of پَارَس (pāras), فَارْسی (fārsī), and فَارَس (fāras).

def: adj. Persian ( = pārsī; pārsīk).
adj. = pārsik; pārsī.

more: s. m. A reapinghook, a sickle.

def: s.m. The herb maiden-hair, Pteris lunulata.
more: s. m. Name of the herb maiden hair. (Pteris lunulata).

def: adv. S. परश्वस्. The second day before or after the present; the day before yesterday; the day after to-morrow. Parsoṅ piā āvan kah jo gaë, kab āvegī bairan parsoṅ? Jiarā chāhe uṛ jāë miloṅ, mo se uṛā hī na jāë binā par soṅ . Song. Ṭhumrī .
wety: Inherited from Sanskrit परश्वस् (paraśvas), from पर (para, “next, following”) + श्वस् (śvas, “tomorrow”).

def: adv. The second day before or after the present; the day before yesterday; the day after to-morrow.
more: adv. 1. The day before yesterday. 2. The day after to-morrow.

def: s.m. = paraśu-rām, q.v.s.v. paraśu. adj. Dying, at the point of death, expiring; lifeless, dead.
more: n. prop. The sixth Avatār, descent upon earth or incarnation of Vish̤ṇu. This personage was the son of Jamadagni. He is, from his father, called Jāmadagni: and, the deity descended in this form to destroy the Kshatriyas (or Chh̤atrīs ) who were become tyrannical. Renukā, wife of Jamadagni, was interrupted in bringing water from the river by Kārtavīrjārjuna, a prince of the Kshatriyas, who was sporting in the water with his thousand wives; for which Parasurāmaʼs father, Jamadagni, cursed him. The Kshatriya prince killed Jamadagni; and Jāmadagni vowed not to leave a Kshatriya on the face of the earth. He is reported to have extirpated them twenty one times; the women with child each time producing a new race: and, they say that there have been no Kshatriyas since; those so called being of spurious breed, or Varṇasankars.

def: s.m. = pārśva, q.v.
s.m. Side; part of the body below the arm-pit, the ribs, the side; — adv. By the side (of, -ke), near ( = pās)
subs: s.m. Spasm of the chest; stitch in the side
s.m. One who stays at or near the side of another
adj. & s.m. At the side, attendant, adjacent; — an attendant.

def: adj. & s.m. Of or pertaining to the side, lateral; — sidesman, partisan; associate or companion.
s.m. A large reel (for winding thread, &c. = paretā).
more: E. n. m. 1. Portion; share; quota; dividend; contribution. 2. The rate at which the revenue demand falls on each bīghā or plough. It is sometimes also used for the whole demand. Paṛte se le dām dūgne, māne bāt na mhārī ne, Hamāṅ to lūṭ līyā paṭvārī ne . W. Rus. song. Full twice my rent he takes from me, in vain I plead, I'm plundered out and out—this scribe a jot wont heed. paṛtā mālguzārī , n. f. Rateable amount of revenue. paṛtā mutawassat , Ped. n. m. An average rate.
s. m. A reel (for winding thread). ¶ purtā, adj. (dakh.) See موافق muwāfiḳ.

def: s.m. 'What falls to each individual'; share, portion, quota; dividend; rate, the rate at which the revenue demand falls on each plough or bīghā of land
s.m. = pratāp, q.v.
more: s. m. Bow-shot, the range of an arrow, musket, &c.

def: s.m. Bowshot, range of an arrow, musket, &c.

adj. & adv. = pratyaksh, q.v. s.m. & adv. Perceptible to the eye, in sight, perceptible, visible, sensible, cognizable by any of the organs of sense; clear, distinct, evident, manifest, apparent, tangible, undoubted, express, explicit, actual, real; — presence; perceptibility, distinctness; observation, inspection; — in the sight (of), in the presence (of); with direct personal knowledge, distinctly, clearly
subs: s.m. Ocular or visible proof, the evidence of the senses; an organ or faculty of perception
s.m. Seeing with one's own eyes; an eye-witness

def: 1. adj. Perceptible, obvious, evident, apparent, pubhck, present. 2. adv. In the presence, before, evidently, openly.
s. f. Agreement, compact, stipulation, engagement, promise.
s.f. Remeasurement of a field, &c. (see paṛtāl, the usual form)
more: n. f. H. par another, tol weighment. 1. Revision; review, comparison. 2. Testing the survey; remeasurement or survey; reweighment. paṛtāl paṛnā , v. n. To be assailed with a shower of blows; to get a severe shoe-beating. Aisī paṛtāl paṛī, ghar kā rastah bhūl gayā . He got such a shoe-beating that he forgot his way home.

def: s.f. The baggage of a horseman carried all on one bullock or pony
more: n. f. The baggage of a horseman carried on a bullock or pony. partal kā ṭaṭṭū , n. m. A packhorse; a bat-horse.
s. f. The baggage of a horseman carried all on one bullock or ṭaṭṭū. پرتل کاٿٿو partal kā ṭaṭṭū, A packhorse, a bat-horse.

def: s.f. Bringing to the test, testing, proving, comparing; revision, review, comparison (with some standard), collation; recounting; remeasurement (of a field, &c.); re-weighing; repayment (with a stick, &c.), punishment, beating (also written par-tāl)
subs: (-par), Punishment to overtake, to suffer a beating, be beaten

(-kī), To make trial (of), to bring to the test, to try, test, examine, prove; to revise, review, compare (with some standard); to collate; to check or audit (accounts); to re-count; to re-measure, re-weigh.

def: s.f. = partal, q.v. s.f. Remeasurement of a field, &c. (see paṛtāl, the usual form)
s.m. Sword-belt, shoulder-belt; belt, strap
s.m. Belt, &c. = partalā, q.v. s.m. Sword-belt, shoulder-belt; belt, strap
n. m. Shoulder-belt and cartouche; accoutrements.
v.t. = paṛtāl karnā, q.v.s.v. paṛtāl. s.f. Remeasurement of a field, &c. (see paṛtāl, the usual form)
v. n. 1. To try; test; bring to the test; examine; audit; check; count again; remeasure. 2. To revise; review; collate; compare. ind-ul-paṛtāl . Ped. adv. At the time of testing, or examining.

s.m. corr. of prati-pālan, q.v. s.m. = prati-pāl, q.v. s.m. Protecting, guarding, defending, cherishing, patronizing, protection, fostering, rearing, breeding; entertaining; — cherisher, patron, &c. = prati-pālak, q.v.
s.f. = pratijnā, pratigyā, q.v. See pratigyā.
more: n. f. S. प्रतिज्ञा See اقرار (1, 3.) 1. Good name; reputation; character ( lālī ). He Nārāyan, ab-ke merī partaṅgā rakh le? Wom. 2. Chastity; purity; continence. 3. ( In logic .) The proposition, the assertion to be proved. pratigyā patr . See اقرارنامه

def: s.m. Light, ray, beam, sunbeam, moonbeam, splendour; reflection; enlightenment.
more: s. m. Light, rays, sunbeams, moonbeams. (Sans. प्रताप ).

def: s.m. Severalty, individuality, separation, separateness, singleness, difference, variety.

adj. & s.m. Earthen, earthly, terrestrial, relating to the earth, springing or derived from the earth, earthy; ruling or possessing the earth; — dweller on the earth, inhabitant of the earth; lord of the earth, king, sovereign; — an earthen vessel.
s.f. = paṛtī, q.v.
more: n. f. S. पत् to fall, Pr. paṛ . Uncultivated, fallow land; lands culturable but not cultivated; waste. Sab chās hamar paṛtī paṛal chhī . Tir. The whole of my land is lying fallow. paṛtī jadīd , n. f. Lands recently left fallow. paṛtī-i-qadīm , n. Land which has long been lying uncultivated.
s. m. Trust, confidence, belief, faith.

ety: S. पतिता; or paṛ, rt. of paṛnā+S. aff. ति
def: s.f. Land recently left fallow
subs: s.f. Land which has long lain uucultivated or fallow.

def: (Old H.) = pratīt, and pratīti, qq.v. part. Gone away; gone by, past; acknowledged, proved; believed, trusted; experienced, known, well-known, famous, celebrated, renowned; trusting, believing; satisfied, glad, pleased, delighted
subs: (˚īta+ar˚), adj. Having a recognized or acknowledged meaning.

def: s.f. = pratīti, q.v. s.f. Clear apprehension or insight (into), clear notion (of), distinct conception; complete understanding or ascertainment, knowledge, experience; conviction; faith, belief; trust, credit; fame, notoriety
subs: (or partīt) karnā (-kī), To form a distinct conception (of), to examine; to believe; to trust (in), rely (on), put faith (in), &c.

def: s.m. Limb, member; knot or joint in a reed ( = parus).
wety: Inherited from Sauraseni Prakrit 𑀧𑀭𑀺 (pari), 𑀉𑀧𑁆𑀧𑀭𑀺 (uppari), from Sanskrit उपरि (upari, “above”).

def: s.m. See پر paru
s. in compos. (dakh.) One who casts or causes to fall.
adj. (dakh.) Falling; faller.
s.m. A buffalo calf, a young buffalo ( = pāṛā, paṛā).
s.m. Knot, joint (of a cane, or reed, &c.); junction.

adj. & s.m. Rough, rugged, uneven; shaggy; keen, piercing (as the wind); harsh, discordant; hard, unkind, cruel, stern, severe, churlish; abusive, contumelious; coarse, gross; — unkind, harsh, or contumelious speech, abuse; — a species of Barleria with blue flowers, Barleria prionitis; the tree Xylocarpus granatum.
s.m. Roughness, violence, abuse, contumelious speech; misdemeanour; — aloe-wood or agallochum.
s.f. Care, concern, anxiety, vexation; fear, terror; inclination, desire, affection, concupiscence; want, need; rest, quiet.
more: n. f. 1. Desire; want; need; occasion. 2. Care; concern; anxiety. Jis jā pe niṅd āī, phir wāṅ hī in ko sonā; Parvā na kuchh palang kī, nai chāhyë bichhonā . Children. Nazīr. Wherever sleep comes on the child's soon fast asleep. No care at all for bed or bedding all aheep.

n. f. S. प्रतिपद, , Pr. paḍīvāā . The first day of a lunar fortnight, the first of the moon's increase. Paṛvā gavan na kījye jo sone kī hoë . Prov. On paṛvā (1st day of the lunar fortnight) a journey never go, though gold it should foreshow.

Farrukh, n. m. A male young buffalo. Sote kā paṛvā ( kaṭṛā ), jāgte ki paṛyā ( kaṭyā ). Prov. The waking man changes his male buffalo for the sleeper's female buffalo (just born). (To sleep is to lose).
s. f. 1. Care, concern, anxiety, vexation. 2. Fear, terrour. 3. Inclination, affection, concupiscence, desire. 4. Rest, quiet.

def: s. See سلخ salaḵẖ.
s.m. A knot; a festival; &c. = parb, parab, q.v.
subs: s.m. A joint, knuckle; — the junction of the fifteenth and the first of a lunar fortnight, the precise moment of the full and change of the moon
s.m. One who works on holidays; a Brāhmaṇ who for the sake of gain performs on ordinary days such ceremonies as should be performed only on festivals
s.m. One who has intercourse with his wife on festivals or holidays
s.m. A conjunction of parva, q.v.

def: s.f. = parwā, q.v. s.m. A knot; a festival; &c. = parb, parab, q.v.
more: s. f. Same as پروا parwā, q. v.
subs: s.m. A joint, knuckle; — the junction of the fifteenth and the first of a lunar fortnight, the precise moment of the full and change of the moon
s.m. One who works on holidays; a Brāhmaṇ who for the sake of gain performs on ordinary days such ceremonies as should be performed only on festivals
s.m. One who has intercourse with his wife on festivals or holidays
s.m. A conjunction of parva, q.v.

def: adj. & s.m. Standing in need of, having occasion for, necessitated; — one who stands in need of, &c.
(from پروا) adj. One who stands in need of, necessitated, having occasion for.
s.m. A disease of the eyelids in which the eyelashes fall off, and new, crooked hairs come out; a stye.
more: n. m. H. par another, bāl hair. A disease of the eyelids, in which new crooked hairs come out.
s. m. A disease of the eyelids in which the eyelashes fall, a sty or stythe.

def: adj. Authentic, true, &c. (see pramāṇ); — s.m. The yard (of a sail)
more: n. The yard arm of a ship.

adj. True; just; right; trustworthy; authentic. 'Bāman bachan parvān, Gangā jī kī rainkā tū chandan kar-ke mān.' 'Jāṭ bachan parvān, Gangā jī kī meṅḍkī tū gaū kar-ke mān .' The Brahman saith 'my word is true, the Ganges' sand for sandal take.' The Jāt replies, 'my word as true, the Ganges' frog for milch cow take.' parvān chaṛhnā , Wom. v. n. 1. To grow; increase; develop. 2. To thrive; prosper; flourish. Phale, phūle, parvān chaṛhe! Benediction. Blossom and bloom and prosperous grow! 3. To be married, tied in wedlock. Niklā māṅ bāp kā na kuchh armān! 'Hāë beṭā! na tum chaṛhīṅ parvān.'! Shauq. Your parents' heart's desire was fated not to be! Alas, my son! your marriage we were not to see!
s. The yard (of a sail). پروان چڙهنا parwān chaṛhnā, To grow up (a phrase peculiar to women).
subs: v.n. To grow up, grow, increase, thrive, prosper, flourish; to be married (a phrase peculiar to women).

ety: at which double oblations are offered, three cakes to the father, paternal grandfather and great-grandfather, and three to the maternal grandfather, his father and grandfather; and the crumbs of each
def: s.m. = pārvaṇ.
more: n. m. lit . relating to parva festival, determined by the changes of the moon. A particular sarādh . The general funeral ceremony of offerings to all the manes at the Paṛvā or junction of the sun and moon, at which double oblations are offered, viz. three cakes to the father, paternal grandfather, and great grandfather; and three to the maternal grandfather, great grandfather, and great great grandfather; and the crumbs of each set to the remote ancestors in each line.

def: s.m. Warrant, authority, sanction (in writing), order, pass, passport; written precept or command; letters patent, license, grant; an order of appointment; a vernacular letter addressed to a subordinate officer
more: n. m. 1. A moth. (H. pataṅg ). 2. ( Poet .) A lover.

n. m. P. farmūd ordered. A written precept or command; letters patent; license; patent; warrant; writ; grant; passport; a custom-house permit or pass; an order of appointment; a vernacular letter addressed to a subordinate officer.
s. m. 1. An order, a pass, a license, leave, command, a precept, a warrant. 2. A butterfly, a moth. پروانه کسي کاهونا pawāna kisī kā honā, To be desperately in love with any one.
subs: s.m. Writ of protection of the person
(-ko, or -ke wāst̤e), To give an order (to); to grant a warrant or license
s.m. A writer of vernacular orders.

def: s.m. A moth; a butterfly; (poet.) a lover
subs: (-kā), To be desperately in love (with), be an ardent lover (of).

def: s.f. Command, order; permission, leave ( = ijāzat, q.v.). s.f. Permission, liberty, leave, authority, sanction; leave to depart, dismissal; authority or liberty to do anything; licence; passport
more: (from پروانه) s. f. Command, order, permission.
subs: s.m. One who seeks permission or sanction (for any purpose); applicant; petitioner
v.t. To grant leave or permission, to permit, allow, let; to give (one) leave to depart; to grant, admit, concede, comply with; to authorize, sanction; to license; to empower
s.m. A written document by which a permission is conferred; authority; licence.
